    <item>
        <guid>nba530394</guid>
        <title>LeBron James: Game-high 27 points in Game 1 loss</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/lebron-james-2344</link>
        <description>James posted 27 points (12-17 FG, 3-6 3Pt, 0-1 FT), six assists, four rebounds and one steal in 36 minutes during Tuesday's 108-90 loss to the Thunder in Game 1 of the Western Conference Semifinals.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Tue, 05 May 2026 8:27:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba530392</guid>
        <title>Chet Holmgren: Double-doubles in Game 1 win</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/chet-holmgren-5697</link>
        <description>Holmgren contributed 24 points (9-17 FG, 2-2 3Pt, 4-4 FT), 12 rebounds, three blocks, one assist and one steal across 31 minutes in Tuesday's 108-90 win over the Lakers in Game 1 of the Western Conference Semifinals.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Tue, 05 May 2026 8:11:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba530390</guid>
        <title>James Harden: Full stat line in Game 1 loss</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/james-harden-3018</link>
        <description>Harden notched 22 points (6-15 FG, 1-7 3Pt, 9-9 FT), eight rebounds, seven assists, two blocks and one steal across 35 minutes in Tuesday's 111-101 loss to the Pistons in Game 1 of the Eastern Conference Semifinals.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Tue, 05 May 2026 6:51:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba530389</guid>
        <title>Cade Cunningham: Paces Detroit in Game 1 win</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/cade-cunningham-5336</link>
        <description>Cunningham totaled 23 points (6-19 FG, 2-5 3Pt, 9-11 FT), seven assists, three rebounds and two steals across 42 minutes in Tuesday's 111-101 win over Cleveland in Game 1 of the Eastern Conference Semifinals.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Tue, 05 May 2026 6:45:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba530382</guid>
        <title>Ayo Dosunmu: Iffy for Game 2</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/ayo-dosunmu-5337</link>
        <description>Dosunmu (calf) is questionable for Game 2 of the Western Conference Semifinals against the Spurs on Wednesday.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Tue, 05 May 2026 2:58:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
